summary: Initialized Go module (github.com/panda/agent-task-center) with Go 1.26, created full directory structure (cmd/task-dashboard, internal/{config,scanner,handler,model}, web/{templates,static/js,static/css}), added gin-gonic/gin and gopkg.in/yaml.v3 dependencies, created web/embed.go with //go:embed directive, and cmd/task-dashboard/main.go with empty main(). keyDecisions: Placeholder files added to templates/static dirs so go:embed compiles (dotfiles are not embeddable by Go)
